executive_summary: Use a bounded offline protocol for industrial defect detection with defect recall and one controlled comparison.

verified_findings.text: Traceable records are required for industrial defect detection.
The controlled comparison uses defect recall.

inferred_findings.text: A small offline experiment is preferable before production integration.

proposed_method: Freeze the evaluation inputs, run baseline and proposed conditions, and compare defect recall.
experiment_plan: Use at least 30 examples, fixed preprocessing, repeated seeds, and uncertainty reporting.
limitations: Synthetic fixtures do not establish a real scientific result
Thresholds require calibration on real data
next_actions: Replace synthetic evidence with verified primary sources
